source_pr.title: *: check `tidb_enable_extended_stats` in analyze and row count estimation
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/23021

Problem Summary:

`tidb_enable_extended_stats` should control the behavior of analyze and row count estimation as well.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Add these checks.

How it Works:

### Related changes

N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Check `tidb_enable_extended_stats` in analyze and row count estimation
